description: Mexican-American street gang based in Atwater Village, Los Angeles County, founded in the 1930s. Engages in murder, assault, drug trafficking, racketeering, and other crimes. Allied with the Mexican Mafia and Sureños, and rivals several other gangs. Still active.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Atwater Village , Glendale , Gwinnett County, Georgia Bremen, Georgia
country_links.context: The gang has territory in Georgia, indicating it operates in that state.
